title: clematis pseudootophora
intro: Clematis pseudootophora, a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayas, is a member of the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, Clematis pseudootophora has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reduced fever, relief from pain and inflammation, and improved digestion. Clematis pseudootophora can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
